title: Starlight frontmatter
$comment: Hand-authored mirror of @astrojs/starlight@0.41's docs frontmatter schema (node_modules/@astrojs/starlight/schema.ts and schemas/*). Astro's zod schema is still the runtime authority; this copy exists so violations fail fast in CI with per-field annotations instead of at build time. Keep in sync when upgrading Starlight. Root `additionalProperties` MUST stay true: OKF fields (type/tags/timestamp) and future keys are policed by the other schemas in docmeta.config.yaml, not this one. Consequence: a misspelled OPTIONAL top-level key (e.g. `templat` for `template`) is NOT caught here — no schema in the stack can reject an unknown top-level key when another schema might own it. Nested objects use `additionalProperties: false`, so typos inside `sidebar`/`hero`/etc. ARE caught. The template's `access`/`groups` MCP auth-seam fields are omitted: this site deferred the MCP package (starport-migration ADR 0004). See starport-migration ADR 0006.

title.description: The title of the current page. Required.

description.description: Short summary used in <meta> tags and search. 150-160 characters recommended.

slug.description: Astro content-collection slug override for this page's URL.

editUrl.description: A URL string overrides the edit link target. A boolean toggles whether the edit link shows at all: true (the Starlight default) shows it, false hides it — both are valid, not just false.

tableOfContents.description: Override the global table-of-contents config, or false to disable.

hero.description: Hero section for landing pages (used with template: splash).

lastUpdated.description: Override the git-derived last-update date, or a boolean to toggle display. Starlight parses this with z.date(), which YAML feeds from either a date (2024-01-05) or a full datetime (2024-01-05T10:30:00Z), so both formats are accepted here.

sidebar.description: Controls how this page appears in the autogenerated sidebar.

banner.description: Announcement banner shown at the top of this page.

pagefind.description: Set to false to exclude this page from the Pagefind search index.

draft.description: Drafts are excluded from production builds.

prevNextLink.description: Override pagination link: boolean toggles it, string sets the label, object sets link and/or label.
